# Avennorth Product Financial Intake Questionnaire

Use this questionnaire when building a five-year business case for any Avennorth product. Answer every question before modeling. These inputs feed directly into the standard financial template.

---

## 1. Product Identity

- **Product name:**
- **One-line description:**
- **Target buyer (title/role):**
- **ServiceNow dependency?** (Yes/No — does it require SN?)
- **Pathfinder dependency?** (Does it consume Pathfinder data?)
- **Other product dependencies:**
- **Current build status:** (Concept / In Progress / Built / Shipping)
- **Expected GA date:**

---

## 2. Pain Point & Market

- **What specific problem does this solve?**
- **How does the customer solve it today?** (Manual process, competitor tool, nothing)
- **What happens if they don't solve it?** (Compliance risk, outage, cost, etc.)
- **How many ServiceNow customers have this problem?** (% of install base)
- **TAM:** (Total market size for this problem category)
- **SAM:** (Subset we can actually reach — SN customers with the need + budget)
- **Is there a direct competitor?** (Name them, or "no direct competitor")

---

## 3. Adoption Dynamics

- **Time to first value:** (Hours? Days? Weeks? Months?)
- **What is the "aha moment"?** (What does the customer see that convinces them?)
- **Does it spread virally within an account?** (Does one team's success pull in others?)
- **Word-of-mouth dynamics:** (Is the buyer community tight? Conferences? User groups?)
- **Compass distribution fit:** (Can partners include this as a SOW line item?)
- **CoreX consulting leverage:** (Do consultants use this during engagements?)
- **Entry price target:** (What price removes procurement friction?)

---

## 4. Stickiness & Switching Costs

- **What dependencies does the product create once deployed?**
  - Data dependencies (what data goes stale/disappears if removed?)
  - Workflow dependencies (what automated processes break?)
  - User habit dependencies (who uses this daily?)
  - Cross-product dependencies (what other products break?)
- **How long until the customer is "locked in"?** (Days? Weeks? Months?)
- **What would removal look like?** (Cancel subscription vs. major migration project)
- **Expected annual logo churn rate:** (1-3% infrastructure / 5-8% SaaS / 10-15% tool)

---

## 5. Pricing Structure

- **Pricing model:** (Per node? Per assessment? Per user? Flat subscription?)
- **Pricing unit:** (What is being counted?)
- **Pricing tiers:** (S/M/L/XL? Or different?)

| Tier | Unit Range | Package A (starting at) | Package B (starting at) |
|------|-----------|------------------------|------------------------|
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |

- **Package structure:** (How many packages? What's in each?)
- **Upgrade path:** (What triggers the customer to move to the higher package?)
- **Price increase strategy:** (0% Y1-Y2, 3% Y3-Y4, 5% Y5 — or different?)

---

## 6. Revenue Assumptions

- **Year 1 new logos:** (How many customers in first year?)
- **Year 2-5 new logo growth rate:** (% increase per year, or absolute numbers)
- **Starting ACV (blended):** (Average contract value for a new customer)
- **ACV growth rate:** (How much does ACV grow year-over-year? Why?)
- **Package A -> B upgrade rate:** (What % upgrade per year? Starting when?)
- **Expansion rate:** (Do customers grow their unit count? By how much?)
- **Annual logo churn:** (Year by year — should reflect stickiness analysis above)
- **Net Revenue Retention target:** (NRR — should be >120% for healthy product)

---

## 7. Cost Structure

### Cost of Revenue (COGS)
- **Cloud infrastructure cost per customer/year:**
- **AI/API token cost per customer/year:** (If uses Claude or other LLMs)
- **ServiceNow license cost:** (SN dev instances, partner program fees)
- **Partner commissions:** (% of channel revenue paid to Compass partners)
- **Other marginal costs per customer:**
- **Target gross margin:** (Should be >85% for software)

### Dedicated Headcount
| Role | When Hired | Loaded Annual Cost | Full-time on this product? |
|------|-----------|-------------------|--------------------------|
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |

### Shared Avennorth Resources (Allocation %)
| Resource | Year 1 % | Year 2 % | Year 3 % | Year 4 % | Year 5 % | Rationale |
|----------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|-----------|
| Founder / Architect | | | | | | |
| SN Developer pool | | | | | | |
| QA / DevOps | | | | | | |
| Shared AI Engine | | | | | | |
| Compass channel mgrs | | | | | | |
| G&A overhead | | | | | | |

### Other Operating Expenses
- **Legal + patents:**
- **Marketing + partner enablement:**
- **Self-serve onboarding investment:**
- **Conference / events:**

---

## 8. Strategic Context

- **How does this product relate to Pathfinder?** (Feeds data? Consumes data? Independent?)
- **Portfolio flywheel position:** (Where does this sit in the Pathfinder -> Bearing -> Contour -> Vantage chain?)
- **Does this product generate leads for other products?** (Which ones? How?)
- **Does this product make CoreX consulting more valuable?** (How?)
- **Cannibalization risk:** (Does it compete with any existing Avennorth product?)

---

## 9. Exit / Acquisition Relevance

- **Does this product increase ServiceNow's acquisition interest?** (How?)
- **Does it fill a known gap in the ServiceNow platform?**
- **Patent-protectable innovations:**
- **At what ARR / customer count does this become acquisition-triggering?**

---

## 10. Scenario Assumptions

For each scenario, provide:

| Assumption | Bear | Likely | Bull | Best Case |
|-----------|------|--------|------|-----------|
| Y5 new logos (annual) | | | | |
| Y5 total customers | | | | |
| Y5 logo churn | | | | |
| Y5 NRR | | | | |
| Upgrade rate | | | | |

---

## 11. Key Risks

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|--------|------------|
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |
| | | | |

---

*Complete this questionnaire, then use the Avennorth Product Financial Template to generate the five-year model.*
